name: Kimi K3
summary: Use a 2.8T multimodal coding model today through Kimi.com, Kimi Work, Kimi Code, or the API. It has a 1M-token context window, with downloadable weights promised by July 27.

name: Inkling
summary: Fine-tune or download a 975B open-weight multimodal model under Apache 2.0, with a lighter Inkling-Small preview for cheaper experiments. Tinker handles customization when local hardware is unrealistic.

name: GPT-5.6
summary: Build with Sol, Terra, or Luna in ChatGPT, Codex, and the API. The cheaper tiers make agentic apps and Codex runs more affordable, and ChatGPT Work can carry longer projects across files and apps.

name: Muse Spark 1.1
summary: Try a multimodal agent model through Meta Model API public preview or Meta AI's Thinking mode. It is aimed at coding, computer use, long-context tool work, and visual-to-code workflows.

name: Grok 4.5
summary: Wire a coding and agent model into Cursor, Grok Build, Vercel, OpenRouter, or the xAI API at $2 per million input tokens. Useful when cost matters more than absolute frontier quality.

name: Video Remix
summary: Remix clips from your phone library by describing relighting, background swaps, or visual styles. It is rolling out in Google Photos for Google AI Plus, Pro, and Ultra subscribers in select countries.

name: Muse Image
summary: Create and edit images in Meta AI, Instagram Stories, and WhatsApp with presets, sketch edits, multi-reference composition, and web-grounded planning. The public-account tagging feature was pulled after backlash.

name: Claude Cowork on web & mobile
summary: Start a background Claude task on web or mobile, then let it keep running in Anthropic's cloud while your laptop is closed. Beta starts with Max users, with more plans to follow.
